body:
Hello, this PR is in reference to PR #2297. I rebased all my commits into one. I ran into some conflicts, so I had to create a new branch to fix them. This PR contains all the suggestions from #2297. I've added screenshots as well just to confirm.

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.

![Screenshot (319)](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/37c0485c-a01b-4888-851d-9512ef4e8d01)

title: Add 1D Heat and Advection Examples to Documentation
